creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
p5-Template-Toolkit 2.22 removed the Autoformat plugin as a configuration
option because the Autoformat plugin is now an external distribution.  This
port provides that Template Toolkit plugin as
textproc/p5-Template-Plugin-Autoformat

It is critical for our production servers to have this, so please commit at
your soonest convenience so we may update them to the latest TT port as well.
